title: SpelOptionInfo Class
description:
SpelOptionInfo Class

SpelOptionInfo Class

Member name	Type	Description

Name	String	Option name

Status	SpelOptionStatus	Option setting Status

Here is an example.

VB Example:

Dim info As SpelControllerInfo

info = m_spel.GetControllerInfo()

Label1.Text = info.Options(1).Name + " " + info.Options(1).Status

C#
examples:
Dim info As SpelControllerInfo
info = m_spel.GetControllerInfo()
Label1.Text = info.Options(1).Name + " " + info.Options(1).Status
